text: There is a sense of anticipation as I step into this clean, modern space. Surrounded by glass walls and bold, colorful displays, I feel the air of innovation and curiosity. The environment is quiet, almost reverent, as if ideas themselves are being honored and protected here. I am reminded that the pursuit of knowledge, especially at the intersection of humans and technology, is both a solitary and a collective act. The space invites me to reflect on how research transforms the world and how I, too, play a tiny part in this endless dance of discovery.
